stimulus:
Welcome!

In this study, you will play three short video games that were generated by Artificial Intelligence (AI) and complete a short survey after each game.

Please make sure you are in a quiet environment where you can focus for the duration of the study. Some games may use sound, so please ensure that your device's volume is not muted.

Press any key to begin.
Press any key to proceed to the first video game.

response: {"creativity-rating":3,"creativity-free-response":"I cant really explain if it was creative or not because there was no explanation as to what I was meant to be doing. Im not sure  what \"cut space\" meant ","originality-rating":3,"originality-free-response":"Again, there was no explanation as to what \"cut space\" meant so I didnt know what I was meant to be doing. Getting something from A to B isnt really that original, and \"cutting space\" didnt seem to do much, as it was either too small or not effective. ","effectiveness-rating":2,"effectiveness-free-response":"Not enjoyable. As there was no actual explanation as to what I was meant to be doing, I was left confused and did not have fun playing it. ","authenticity-rating":3,"attention-check":3,"intentionality-rating":2,"authenticity-intentionality-free-response":"Getting something from A to B is not original, and the \"cut space\" gimmick wasn't really enjoyable, and didnt really show much in the way of effort. "}
